accepted_residual_policy: Preserved UI labels, node/code identifiers, product names, exact source spelling Renderman for Maya, OpenVDB/RIB/Ri/Pxr terms, and volume/VDB technical terms with Chinese context are allowed. Header metadata is outside article translation scope. The term render is accepted only where paired as render（渲染）.

allowed_ascii_residuals.reason: Appears only as render（渲染） with Chinese annotation.
